function.name: _i18n_set_table_field_name
function.description: Set data table field display name using internationalization expression.

fieldDisplayNameList.description: Data table field display name configuration list

displayName.description: Field display name expression (supports internationalization expressions). Must use internationalization expression form: ${T.t('path')}. Where path is the complete path of the translation item in the internationalization translation definition (translateList), for example: ${T.t('grade.name')}
